name: GOLFTEC Cypress
about: GOLFTEC Cypress offers data-driven golf lessons and club fittings utilizing advanced technology such as OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. The service is designed to provide personalized improvement plans, with coaches analyzing swing data to identify key issues and guide students toward their goals. Pricing is based on lesson packages and fittings, with a 30-day refund policy and a one-time pause option available for lesson packs.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized coaching with detailed swing analysis using OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Structured improvement plans with measurable progress tracking
Access to professional club fitting services for equipment optimization

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides a variety of rental clubs during lessons and fittings to ensure you have the appropriate equipment for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no information about bringing outside food or drinks, and no on-site food or beverage service is mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified on the website, as the focus is on skill development through lessons and practice rather than simulator play.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC Cypress kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs and technology suitable for juniors and youth, including advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors to help them understand and improve their game.
